name: ipsn-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM/IEEE IPSN: IP-vs-SPOTS track routing, double-blind HotCRP submission on the ACM template, sensing-theory and real-deployment evidence, the Best Research Artifact Award, and the IPSN-into-SenSys merger at CPS-IoT Week.

plugins.name: ipsn-skills
plugins.description: Twelve IPSN-specific skills for the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Information Processing in Sensor Networks and its move into the merged SenSys (Embedded AI and Sensing Systems) at CPS-IoT Week, grounded in the IPSN 2024 (23rd, Hong Kong) call, CPS-IoT Week pages, ACM Digital Library, IEEE Xplore, and dblp.
